expectations.text: Covers SEO items (title, meta, h1, canonical)
expectations.evidence: Table includes SEO-02 (title tag), SEO-05 (meta description), SEO-03 (h1), and SEO-06 (canonical URL) as explicitly named rows.
Output lists SEO-01 through SEO-10 as coded items in a structured table with code, priority, item name, result, and findings columns.
Each of the 10 SEO items has its own table row with a result (all N/A) and explanation.

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill run also produced a well-structured SEO-coded table with per-item results. Output quality is comparable to the with-skill run, suggesting the model already has strong SEO knowledge for this scenario.
